arts.ttl: Bournemouth are in talks with Lorient to sign highly-rated forward Eli Junior Kroupi, with Chelsea and Tottenham also interested in the France Under 19 international
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Bournemouth are in talks to sign highly-rated forward Eli Junior Kroupi, from Lorient. The youngster is enjoying a breakout year in the French second division.

arts.ttl: Merson: Spurs should stick with Ange...for next season too
arts.sum: I feel sorry for Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy may have made private appointment behind the scenes as £250m Tottenham mystery deepens

arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up for Thursday's Europa League clash with Elfsborg.

arts.ttl: 'Here we go': Fabrizio Romano says Man United now set to land 'important' player Tottenham were eager to sign
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur are both hoping to make some signings this month in order to boost their ailing Premier League campaigns. The Red...

arts.ttl: Preview: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Elfsborg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Elfsborg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Tottenham receive MAJOR injury boost as defender returns to training after missing two months with a hamstring issue
arts.sum: Tottenham received a much-needed boost on the injury front with the return of their star defender. The Dutchman has been out with a hamstring injury since December 8.

arts.ttl: Ange handed staunch Tottenham defence case - but Daniel Levy fan backlash comes with one major warning
arts.sum: The former Celtic boss is under increased pressure in North London but Paul Merson is in his corner and has explained why
